uta.name: ProTime – UTA
uta.jql: cf[22500] = "UTA" AND issuetype in (Bug, Defect) AND NOT labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, automation, SAST, DAST) AND (Classification is EMPTY OR Classification not in (Security)) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

utm.name: ProTime – UTM
utm.jql: cf[22500] = "UTM" AND (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels in ("RCA-Type-Defect", "RCA-TYPE-DEFECT")) AND NOT labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, automation, SAST, DAST) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

wfmClassic.name: ProTime – WFM Classic
wfmClassic.jql: cf[22500] in ("ProTime India", "WFM Classic") AND (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels in ("RCA-Type-Defect", "RCA-TYPE-DEFECT")) AND NOT labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, automation, SAST, DAST) AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC

securityJql: (issuetype in (Bug, Defect) OR labels = "RCA-Type-Defect") AND labels in (Checkmarx, SCA, bitsight, Security, CVE) ORDER BY priority DESC
